title: Scolymocephalus humiflorus
taxonomy: Scolymocephalus humiflorus is a species of flowering plant in the family Annonaceae. It is native to Madagascar and is a part of the order Magnoliales. The plant is further classified under the subfamily Malmeoideae. As part of its classification, it is also known to be a member of the genus Scolymocephalus. Within the plant kingdom, Scolymocephalus humiflorus is a dicotyledonous plant.
